title: Issue Collection
description: One shape for every issue partition: .excn/issues/backlog.json (open, unpulled issues) and .excn/issues/sprint-<N>/sprint-<N>-issues.json (a sprint's pulled issues — its archive once the sprint closes). An issue's file location is its lifecycle state; the record fields are identical in every partition. IDs are globally unique across all files and depends_on may reference any partition, so validation reads across files, not within one. scribe moves issues between files at sprint boundaries and updates status; descriptions are not rewritten.

severity.description: P1 blocking, P2 significant, P3 low-priority.

scope.description: Which area(s) the fix lives in — project-defined.

classification.description: macro = architecture-level; local = tactical; pre-existing = predates current work.

actionable_now.description: false = tracking only, no sprint work planned.

prd.description: The PRD this issue traces to, null if filed directly.

acceptance_criteria.description: Verifiable criteria; the issue closes only when all hold.

slice_type.description: HITL = needs human interaction; AFK = completable without it.

depends_on.description: Issue IDs that must close first.
